mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: hematochezia, neurological symptoms (restlessness, shuffling gait, tip-toe gait), lipid accumulation (hepatosplenomegaly, cardiomegaly)
intellectual disability, epilepsy, heart involvement (dilated cardiomyopathy, left ventricular hypertrophy, sinus bradycardia, AV dissociation)
skeletal dysplasia, joint stiffness, respiratory issues (thoracic cage abnormality), hernia (hydrocele testis and vaginal hydrocele)
progressive muscle weakness, enlarged heart (hypertrophic cardiomyopathy), decreased circulating vitamin C
angiodysplasias causing bleeding (hematochezia), cardiac involvement (left ventricular hypertrophy, dilated cardiomyopathy), hypohydrosis or absence of sweating

mental retardation, coarsening of face, large tongue, liver and spleen enlargement, and hernias
